response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional full-stack experience across top-tier tech companies, deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms, and proven contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source tooling — aligning strongly with the role. However, his resume contains a critical inconsistency (claiming current employment at Google starting in April 2025, which is in the future), and his direct experience with Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin/Java is implied but not explicitly detailed, creating minor uncertainty.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience at Google and Meta with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong open-source portfolio and deep understanding of testing, CI/CD, and cloud deployment
concerns: Employment date at Google listed as April 2025 — currently in the future, raising credibility concerns
Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned despite being required; experience inferred
Limited explicit mention of Kotlin/Java or relational databases like PostgreSQL in key roles
